candidates.why: Component of revenue but not the consolidated top-line; prefer the explicit total line for REVT.
Explicit consolidated top-line revenue figure; best match for total revenue/sales (REVT).
This is a cost line, not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Financial income, not operating revenue; incorrect for REVT.
Interest income, not operating revenue; incorrect for REVT.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income, not revenue; incorrect for REVT.
Comprehensive income, not revenue; incorrect for REVT.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the explicit consolidated top-line; product and service revenues are components and should not be used as REVT.

candidates.why: Direct cost of sales; best match for COGS. Numeric values match Cost of Revenues/COGS, indicating the latter is a duplicate label.
Alternate label for COGS with identical amounts to Cost of goods sold; appears to be a duplicate. Prefer the clearer 'Cost of goods sold' label.
Payroll is broader operating expense and not purely COGS; may include SG&A. Not appropriate for COGS.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Gross (before Government Grants)
candidates.why: R&D expense, not cost of goods sold.
Capitalized R&D, not COGS.
Government grant offset to R&D; not COGS.
Overhead operating expenses (SG&A-type), not direct COGS.
Net operating result, not a pure COGS line.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Financing costs, not COGS.
Aggregate financial result, not COGS.
Specific operating expense, not general COGS.
Inventory component, balance sheet item; not the period’s COGS expense.
Asset account, not COGS.

variables.notes: Cost of goods sold is the clearest direct cost line. Cost of Revenues/COGS appears to be a duplicate with identical values, so only one label is selected.

candidates.why: Share-based comp is a classic SG&A component (overhead personnel cost) and should be included in XSGA components.
Represents operating overhead (selling/general/admin-type expenses) and fits SG&A; should be included.
Equity reserve, not period expense; should not be used as SG&A expense component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization is a D&A item, which should be excluded from SG&A components per instructions.
Balance sheet tax item, not an SG&A expense line.

variables.notes: Selected SG&A components are overhead expense lines and exclude totals and D&A. The duplicate Share-Based Compensation label in the sheet is the same row label, so it is only included once as required.

candidates.why: Income statement R&D expense line; best match for period R&D expense (XRD).

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Gross (before Government Grants)
candidates.why: Gross R&D before grants; not the final net expense but related. Prefer the main 'Research and development' line for XRD.
Capitalized R&D, not current-period P&L expense; should not be primary XRD.
Grant offset to R&D; negative component rather than the gross expense line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D; not the current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not P&L expense.
Balance sheet gross R&D asset; not expense.
Accumulated amortization of R&D asset; not current-period expense line.

variables.notes: The primary income-statement line 'Research and development' is used as XRD; more detailed gross/grant components are not needed for this mapping.

candidates.why: Explicit interest expense line; strong candidate for XINT.
Interest on lease liabilities; a specific type of interest expense and good backup if the main interest expense line is missing for some years.
Specific interest expense on deferred settlement; good backup label.
Generic interest expense label; strong candidate though values not shown in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental interest on lease liabilities; additional backup for interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense line; should not be used for XINT.
Explicitly non-interest-bearing; irrelevant for interest expense mapping.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense labels are provided in priority order so later processing can pick the first available per year. Balance sheet loan balances are excluded.

candidates.why: Represents total shareholders’ equity; no separate non-controlling interest line is present, so this is the best proxy for book equity (BE).
Duplicate total equity label (different casing); include as backup in case of label variation across years.
Balancing line, not a true equity measure; should not be used for BE.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/LI+E, not equity alone; incorrect for BE.

variables.notes: There is no separate non-controlling interest line; Total equity is therefore used as BE. A second casing variant is included as backup for different reporting periods.
No balance sheet line for minority interest or non-controlling interests appears in the preview (e.g., no 'Non-controlling interests' or similar). MIB is therefore set to 0 via an empty selection.
